userspace.getting-started.title: Get started with Werkbank Cloud.
userspace.projects.title: Projects
userspace.projects.your-projects.title: Your Projects
userspace.projects.your-projects.list.em: You don't have any projects yet.
Start by creating a new project.
userspace.projects.table.access_state.di: Only you can access this project.
userspace.projects.table.access_state.re: Only users with explicit access can view this project.

dialog.title: Access settings for project {project}
dialog.description: To determine, whether an external request to your project domain makes its way through to your local machine, the request must be validated against every following access state rule.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: Only you can access this project.

restricted.title: Restricted
restricted.description: Only users with explicit access can view this project, either by sharing a password with them if they don't have a WBCloud account or directly inviting them. You can always access this project.

open.title: Open
open.description: Anyone can access this project. Be aware that this can be a security risk as you're exposing parts of your local machine to the internet.

no_passwords.title: No passwords
no_passwords.description: You don't have any passwords created yet. To share your project with someone, who does not have a WBCloud account, you can create a new password.

dialog.title: New Password
dialog.description: Create a new password which can be used to access the project.

label.title: Label
label.description: Give a name to this password.
label.error: Label must be at least 3 characters.

password.title: Password
password.error: Password must be at least 3 characters.

dialog.title: Delete password {label}?
dialog.description: The password will become invalid for this project. Other projects that use this password will stay accessible.

access.title: Access
access.description: Manage your account access and permissions.

access_keys.title: Access Keys
access_keys.description: Access keys are used to authenticate your services to allow for communication between them.

new_dialog.title: Create new access key
new_dialog.description: Drop in a name and we generate a key for you.

name.label: Name
name.error: Name must be at least 3 characters.

created.title: Access key created
created.description: Make sure to copy the key now, you won't be able to see it again.

password.title: Access {projectName} by {ownerUsername}
password.description: You need to enter a password to access this project.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

wrong_user.title: Wrong user logged in
wrong_user.description: Your user account is not allowed to access this project. You may switch to another account or use a password to continue.

field.label: Password
field.description: Ask the project owner for the password if you don't have it. Multiple passwords may be valid.

password.field_separator: Or login with a permitted user account

account-required.title: Access {projectName} by {ownerUsername}
account-required.description: You need to login using a permitted account to access this project.
